description: Department model for Digital Office. Departments are capability namespaces, permission boundaries, knowledge spaces, and workflow bundles; they are not rigid simulated management hierarchies.

legal.label: Enterprise Legal Department
legal.purpose: Provide in-house legal intake, contract review, compliance triage, product/legal risk review, and business-facing legal synthesis drafts.

source_skill_packs.name: claude-for-legal-zh
source_skill_packs.policy: Stage, verify, and approve before production activation.

source_skill_packs.name: Legal-Skills-Chinese
source_skill_packs.policy: Do not vendor, modify, redistribute, or use commercially until licensing is cleared.

safety_policy.citation_rule: Cite project files, company rules, licensed references, or connector results; mark authority unverified when no reliable source is available.
